traits.name: Elf Weapon Training
traits.text: Proficiency with longsword, shortsword, shortbow, and longbow.

traits.name: Cantrip
traits.text: You know one cantrip of your choice from the wizard spell list (Intelligence is its ability).

traits.name: Extra Language
traits.text: You can speak, read, and write one extra language of your choice.

traits.name: Dwarven Toughness
traits.text: Your hit point maximum increases by 1, and by 1 every time you gain a level.
